parameters.query: SELECT * FROM adoff_autopilot.outreach WHERE status='active' AND NOT replied AND NOT unsubscribed AND ((sequence_step = 0) OR (sequence_step = 1 AND last_email_at < NOW() - interval '3 days') OR (sequence_step = 2 AND last_email_at < NOW() - interval '7 days') OR (sequence_step = 3 AND last_email_at < NOW() - interval '14 days')) AND sequence_step < 4 LIMIT 10;

UPDATE adoff_autopilot.outreach SET sequence_step = sequence_step + 1, last_email_at = NOW(), status = CASE WHEN sequence_step + 1 >= 4 THEN 'completed' ELSE status END WHERE id = $1::bigint RETURNING id, sequence_step, status;
